intro: Myosotis connata, also known as yellow forget-me-not, is a flowering plant species within the borage family (Boraginaceae). The plant is used in traditional medicine, with reported health benefits including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues and wound healing.
